title: Day 0 - Computer Science 電腦科學
summary: CS 的定義：硬體與軟體、問題解決、從 Consumer 到 Creator 的轉變。
summary_en: Definition of CS: hardware & software, problem solving, and the shift from Consumer to Creator.

title: Day 1 - CS IS and IS NOT
title_en: Day 1 - CS IS and IS NOT
summary: 電腦科學不是「使用科技」，而是「創造科技」。Don't just play on your phone, program it!
summary_en: CS is not about 'using technology' but 'creating technology.' Don't just play on your phone, program it!

title: Day 2 - 電腦科學的五大核心領域
title_en: Day 2 - The Five Concept Areas of CS
summary: 電腦系統、演算法與程式設計、資料分析、網路、運算影響。CS 不只是寫程式。
summary_en: Computer Systems, Algorithms & Programming, Data Analysis, Networks, Impact of Computing. CS is more than just coding.

title: Day 3 - Algorithm vs Programming
summary: Algorithm 決定「要做什麼」，Programming 決定「怎麼告訴電腦去做」。
summary_en: Algorithm determines 'what to do,' Programming determines 'how to tell the computer to do it.'

title: Day 4 - Turing Model 圖靈模型
summary: Alan Turing 1937 年提出通用計算裝置，電腦的本質：Input → Process → Output。
summary_en: Alan Turing's 1937 Universal Computational Device. The essence of computers: Input → Process → Output.

title: Day 5 - Turing Model 續篇：可程式化資料處理器
title_en: Day 5 - Turing Model Continued: Programmable Data Processors
summary: 同一組資料，套用不同的程式，就能得到完全不同的結果。真正決定結果的是「程式規則」。
summary_en: Same data, different programs, completely different results. What truly determines the outcome is the 'program rules.'

title: Day 6 - RAG 檢索增強生成
summary: RAG 讓 AI 從「會聊天」走向「真正能工作」：先查資料，再回答問題。
summary_en: RAG transforms AI from 'good at chatting' to 'actually able to work': look up the data first, then answer.

title: Day 7 - Von Neumann Model 馮·紐曼模型
summary: 馮·紐曼提出「儲存程式概念」，將電腦硬體劃分為四大子系統：Memory、ALU、CU、I/O。
summary_en: Von Neumann's 'Stored-program concept' divided computer hardware into four subsystems: Memory, ALU, CU, and I/O.
